fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the depreciation table.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the depreciation table.

fields.name: Period Length
fields.tooltip: Specifies the length of period that each of the depreciation table lines will apply to.

fields.name: Total No. of Units
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total number of units the asset is expected to produce in its lifetime.
